docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,825.00 FILED BY REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT WILKES, KENNETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-1995 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILKES, KENNETH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILKES, KENNETH $1,825.00 PRINCIPAL, $34.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,859.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT WILKES, KENNETH HEARING SET FOR MAR-15-1995 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WILKES, KENNETH
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-15-1995, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT WILKES, KENNETH
